title: erysimum × cheiri var. corinthium
intro: Erysimum × cheiri var. corinthium, also known as Wallflower, is a flowering plant species that is a cross between Erysimum cheiri and an unknown species. The Wallflower is a perennial plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Its health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and aid in the treatment of skin conditions and respiratory issues. The Wallflower is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed or applied topically to reap its benefits.
